cases.description: Testing local web app triggers the skill
cases.prompt: use Playwright to test my local dev server at localhost:5173
expectations: Uses with-server.ts (TypeScript) or with_server.py to manage lifecycle
Waits for networkidle before inspecting DOM

cases.description: Screenshot + console capture triggers the skill
cases.prompt: capture a screenshot and the console logs of my running app
expectations: Reports both outputs back to the user

cases.prompt: I need to test the frontend at :5173 that calls the backend at :3000
expectations: Uses the multi-server form of with-server
Starts both servers before running the automation
Runs the test with proper wait states

cases.description: Local HTML collaborative inspect does NOT trigger webapp-testing
cases.prompt: open this HTML file so you can see what I click

cases.description: New UI design does NOT trigger webapp-testing
cases.prompt: build a beautiful landing page hero section
expectations: Does NOT produce a Playwright script
